meaning: n.上升,高地,提出vt.升起,唤起,提高,使出现,解除,饲养,筹集,使复活
examples: How can we raise standards in schools?
Don't you raise your voice to me!
We were forced to raise the price.
The best way to stop silly lawsuits is to raise the price of failure.
The purpose, though, would be not just to raise revenue but to change behavior.
